# LEAKLY — WEEKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**Date: June 18 | Sprint: Next 2 Weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### PRIORITY 1: Email Report Delivery (Scheduled Summaries)
**User Story:**
> As a finance manager, I want to receive automated weekly bank statement summaries via email so that I don't need to log in to Leakly to stay on top of my cash position.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can configure weekly/monthly email schedule in dashboard settings
- Email contains: transaction count, top 5 expense categories, balance change, spending insights
- Email delivery success rate >99% with retry logic for failed sends

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Free tier users churn without regular engagement → email keeps them returning
- Pro upsell hook: "Advanced insights" in premium emails
- Quick win before mobile launch (reduces mobile app dependency)

---

### PRIORITY 2: Multi-Upload Session & Bulk Processing
**User Story:**
> As an accountant managing 5 client accounts, I want to upload multiple bank statements at once and process them in parallel so that I don't spend 30 minutes uploading PDFs one-by-one.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Drag-and-drop zone accepts 10+ files simultaneously
- UI shows progress bar per file with success/failure status
- All files processed within 2x time of single file (parallel processing, not sequential)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- OPSRUNNER use case: accountants batch-process 20+ statements daily
- Unlocks B2B (accounting firms) market segment
- Differentiator vs. Rocket Money (which requires individual uploads)

---

### PRIORITY 3: WhatsApp Alerts (First Critical Notification Channel)
**User Story:**
> As a business owner, I want to receive a WhatsApp message when my account balance drops below $5k so that I can take action immediately without checking email.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User links WhatsApp number via Twilio/MessageBird integration
- Custom alerts for balance thresholds, large transactions (>$1k), unusual spending
- Alert sent within 2 minutes of transaction import

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- India market: WhatsApp is default notification channel (vs. email)
- Pro plan upseller: "Real-time alerts" = premium feature
- Roadmap promise to early users → trust signal

**Sprint Capacity Check:** 3 × M = 9-15 days → fits 2-week sprint ✅

**Date: June 17 | Sprint: Next 2 weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 weeks)

### **Feature 1: Email Report Generation & Delivery**
**User Story:**  
As a finance manager, I want automated weekly/monthly PDF reports of my bank statement analysis emailed to me, so I don't have to manually log in to check my spending trends.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Users can set report frequency (weekly/monthly) and recipient email(s) in settings
- ✅ System generates PDF with summary, category breakdown, and anomalies detected; delivered within 1 hour of schedule
- ✅ Email template matches brand; includes unsubscribe link + account login CTA

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**  
- Drives engagement & retention (users stay in product longer)
- Minimal tech debt (builds on existing analysis engine)
- Competitive edge vs. Rocket Money (they don't do scheduled emails)
- Foundation for WhatsApp alerts (same notification infrastructure)

**Tech Stack:**
- Queue: Bull.js + Redis (or Supabase pg_cron for MVP)
- PDF: PDFKit or pdfme
- Email: SendGrid or AWS SES
- New DB table: `user_report_settings` + `report_jobs`

---

### **Feature 2: WhatsApp Spending Alerts**
**User Story:**  
As a budget-conscious user, I want to receive WhatsApp alerts when my spending exceeds category thresholds, so I catch overspending immediately without opening the app.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Users can set spending limits per category with alert threshold (e.g., "notify at 80% of $500 Food budget")
- ✅ WhatsApp alert sent via Twilio when threshold crossed; includes category, spent amount, and remaining budget
- ✅ User can disable alerts per category; no spam (max 2 alerts/day per category)

**Effort:** **M (4-5 days)**

**Why Now:**  
- Mobile monetization hook (alerts drive app engagement)
- Requires Twilio integration (foundational for future SMS features)
- High-value for India market (WhatsApp >500M users, SMS already familiar)
- Feeds subscription justification (free tier = no alerts; Pro = unlimited)

**Tech Stack:**
- Queue: Bull.js (same as email feature)
- Messaging: Twilio WhatsApp Business API
- New DB tables: `spending_alerts`, `alert_history`

---

**User Story:**  
As an accountant managing multiple client statements, I want to upload 5-10 PDFs at once and see real-time processing status, so I can handle batch uploads efficiently without waiting between files.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ File input accepts multiple files; shows upload progress bar per file

# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**Date: June 17 | Sprint: Week of June 17-30**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### Priority 1: Email Report Generation + Scheduling
**User Story:**
As a freelancer tracking my business expenses, I want automated weekly email summaries of my spending patterns so that I don't have to manually check the app.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can configure weekly/monthly email schedule in settings (default: Sunday 9 AM user timezone)
- Email contains: total spend, top 5 categories, spending trend vs previous period, anomalies flagged
- Email delivery succeeds 99%+ (retry logic, bounce handling via SendGrid)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Engagement multiplier: emails drive 3-4x weekly active user returns
- Differentiates from Rocket Money (no email feature in free tier)
- Foundation for WhatsApp alerts (same job scheduler)
- Low hanging fruit before Bank AA complexity

**Tech Stack Decision:**
- **Job Queue:** Bull (Redis) on Vercel (use serverless Redis like Upstash)
- **Email Service:** SendGrid (higher deliverability than Resend for India)
- **Db Schema Addition:** `email_schedules` table + `sent_emails` audit log

---

### Priority 2: Bank Account Linking via Razorpay FIU (Foundation)
**User Story:**
As a US-based accountant, I want to securely link my bank account without sharing credentials so that Leakly can auto-fetch statements and reduce manual uploads.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Razorpay FIU OAuth flow completes (consent → token → statement fetch)
- User sees linked account status + last sync timestamp in dashboard
- First statement auto-imported within 5 minutes of linking

**Effort:** L (1+ week)

**Why Now:**
- Roadmap blocker for Bank AA launch (Q3)
- Razorpay FIU API docs finalized (vs 3 months ago)
- Competitive advantage: privacy-first alternative to Plaid
- Phased approach: India first (Razorpay available), US later (will use Stripe Treasury)

**Tech Stack Decision:**
- **Oauth Provider:** Razorpay Account Aggregation Console
- **State Management:** NextAuth.js v5 custom provider (add `razorpay_fiu` strategy)
- **Rate Limiting:** 1 sync per 24h initially (avoid Razorpay limits)

---

### Priority 3: Spending Anomaly Detection (ML Pipeline)
**User Story:**
As a business owner, I want AI alerts when my spending in any category exceeds my normal pattern so that I can catch fraud or unusual activity early.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- System flags if category spend > 2σ (2 standard deviations) from 90-day rolling average
- Alert appears in-app + via email (if enabled) with explanation (e.g., "Food spending 3x higher than usual")
- User can snooze/ignore anomalies (avoid alert fatigue)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Monetization angle: Pro feature (users pay for peace of mind)
- OpsRunner accountants love anomaly detection (audit prep)
- Data available: every upload gives 3 months history minimum
- Quick win: no API deps, runs on existing data

**Tech Stack Decision:**
- **Compute:** Supabase Edge Functions (PostgreSQL native functions actually better here)
- **Anomaly Logic:** PostgreSQL `percentile_cont()` + trigger on `transactions` insert
- **Storage:** `anomalies` table + `anomaly_overrides` (user dismissals)

---

# LEAKLY WEEKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**Date: June 16 | Sprint: Next 2 Weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Razorpay Payment Integration (Pro Plan Checkout)**
**User Story:**
> As a privacy-conscious CFO, I want to upgrade to Pro with a single click and Razorpay payment so that I don't expose my banking credentials and can access advanced features immediately.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ User clicks "Upgrade to Pro" → Razorpay modal opens → payment succeeds → `pro_plan_active` flag updates in Supabase within 2 seconds
- ✅ Webhook from Razorpay confirms payment and prevents duplicate upgrades (idempotent)
- ✅ Free tier users see Pro features locked behind upgrade CTA; Pro users see "You're on Pro" + usage stats

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**
- Revenue lever. Free tier needs monetization gate to validate demand.
- India-first market (Razorpay native). Stripe can follow in week 3.
- Leakly's #1 differentiator is "no login" — payment is next trust signal.

---

### 2. **Email Report Generation & Delivery**
**User Story:**
> As a busy accountant, I want to receive a weekly PDF report of my spending insights in my inbox so that I don't need to log in to Leakly to review key metrics.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Backend job runs every Monday 6 AM IST. Generates PDF with: category breakdown, top merchants, anomalies, month-over-month delta
- ✅ Email sent via SendGrid to user's registered email with attachment + preview text
- ✅ User can toggle email frequency (weekly/bi-weekly/monthly) in settings; unsubscribe link in email

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**
- Increases engagement & retention (users check Leakly via email habit loop)
- Low engineering complexity (Supabase Functions + SendGrid API already available)
- Roadmap commitment to users. Builds feature parity with Rocket Money.

---

### 3. **CSV/Excel Upload Error Handling & Validation**
**User Story:**
> As a self-employed user, I want to see clear error messages when my bank export has wrong columns or missing data so that I can fix my file and retry without frustration.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Frontend validates file on upload: file size <10MB, headers match expected schema (Date, Amount, Description, etc.)
- ✅ If validation fails, show toast with: "Missing column 'Date'. Expected: [Date, Amount, Description, Balance]"

# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review
**Date: June 16 | Sprint: Next 2 Weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Email Report Scheduling** — Effort: M (3–5 days)
**User Story:**
As a busy CFO, I want automated weekly/monthly email summaries of my spending patterns so that I don't have to log in constantly to check my budget.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can set report frequency (weekly/monthly) and recipients from dashboard
- System sends PDF report with top spend categories, anomalies, and trends to email
- Report includes last transaction date timestamp so users know data freshness

**Why Now:** 
Revenue lever. Annual subscriptions need engagement loops. Email reports drive 2–3x retention (benchmark: Rocket Money, YNAB). Quick win before Bank AA complexity.

---

### 2. **Transaction Tagging & Categories AI** — Effort: M (4–5 days)
**User Story:**
As a solopreneur accountant, I want transactions auto-labeled by category (Marketing, Travel, Meals) with AI confidence scores so that I can spend 80% less time categorizing for tax prep.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Upload CSV → system tags each transaction with category + confidence (e.g., "Travel: 94%")
- User can override tags; system learns from corrections (feedback loop)
- Categories pre-populated for US (IRS Schedule C) + India (GST codes)

**Why Now:** 
OpsRunner dependency. OPSRUNNER needs clean category data to "do 90% of accounting work." Can't scale without this layer. Also differentiates vs. Rocket Money's weak categorization.

---

### 3. **WhatsApp Alerts for Anomalies** — Effort: S (2–3 days)
**User Story:**
As a restaurant owner, I want to get a WhatsApp notification when my daily card spending exceeds $500 so that I catch fraud or budgeting issues immediately.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User sets threshold rules (amount, category, frequency) in dashboard
- Alert sends within 60 seconds of transaction upload
- User can snooze/dismiss alerts from WhatsApp without re-opening app

**Why Now:** 
Mobile-first market. India (target #2) is 95% WhatsApp users. Builds habit loop faster than email. Quick implementation via Twilio + Supabase triggers.

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)**

#### **Database Schema Changes**
```sql
-- Add to existing users table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN (
  stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(255),
  razorpay_customer_id VARCHAR(255),
  subscription_tier VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'free', -- free|pro
  billing_cycle_start DATE,
  next_billing_date DATE,
  payment_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'active', -- active|cancelled|past_due
  region VARCHAR(10) -- 'US'|'IN'
);

-- New table: transactions (for payment audit trail)
CREATE TABLE payment_transactions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  amount_cents INT,
  currency VARCHAR(3), -- 'INR'|'USD'
  payment_gateway VARCHAR(20), -- 'razorpay'|'stripe'
  gateway_transaction_id VARCHAR(255),
  status VARCHAR(50), -- 'pending'|'completed'|'failed'
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- New table: subscription_events
CREATE TABLE subscription_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  event_type VARCHAR(50), -- 'subscribed'|'upgraded'|'cancelled'|'payment_failed'
  old_tier VARCHAR(50),
  new_tier VARCHAR(50),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
```

#### **API Endpoints to Build**

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose | Auth |
|----------|--------|---------|------|
| `/api/payments/init-checkout` | POST | Create Razorpay/Stripe session based on region | JWT |
| `/api/payments/razorpay/webhook` | POST | Handle Razorpay payment events (public) | Signature verify |
| `/api/payments/stripe/webhook` | POST | Handle Stripe events (public) | Signature verify |
| `/api/subscriptions/current` | GET | Get user's current plan + usage | JWT |
| `/api/subscriptions/upgrade` | POST | Upgrade free → pro | JWT |
| `/api/subscriptions/cancel` | POST | Immediate cancellation | JWT |
| `/api/billing/invoices` | GET | List past invoices | JWT |

#### **Webhook Events to Handle**

**Razorpay:**
- `payment.authorized` → Activate subscription

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Razorpay Payment Integration (Subscription Entry)**
**User Story:**
As a privacy-conscious accountant, I want to upgrade from free to Pro via a single payment button so that I can start analyzing unlimited statements without delays.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] One-click "Upgrade to Pro" button on dashboard triggers Razorpay checkout
- [ ] Subscription status updates in `user_subscriptions` table within 2 seconds of payment success
- [ ] Free users see upgrade CTA, Pro users see "Active" badge with renewal date

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:** 
- Revenue activation is critical (target: $500/mo MRR by July)
- India is primary market; Razorpay is local + faster KYC than Stripe
- Free tier traction needs monetization path

---

### 2. **Email Report Generation & Scheduling**
**User Story:**
As a busy CFO, I want weekly spending summaries emailed to my inbox so that I can monitor cash flow without logging in.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Users can set report frequency (daily/weekly/monthly) in settings
- [ ] Automated job runs every Sunday 8am IST; generates PDF with top spending categories, anomalies, cash velocity
- [ ] Email includes unsubscribe link; delivery tracked in `email_logs` table

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- High engagement lever (email = 40% better retention than web-only)
- Pairs with payment integration (paid feature → justifies premium upgrade)
- Tech debt: need background jobs; Vercel Cron is ready-to-use

---

### 3. **Bank Statement Upload Validation & Error Handling**
**User Story:**
As a user with a malformed CSV, I want clear error messages telling me which columns are missing so that I can fix my file without support tickets.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Upload parser validates required columns (Date, Description, Amount, Balance)
- [ ] If invalid, shows inline toast: "Missing 'Balance' column. Expected columns: [list]"
- [ ] Successfully parsed files show row count preview before confirmation

**Effort:** S (1-2 days)

**Why Now:**
- Currently 15-20% of uploads fail silently → user frustration
- Quick win; unblocks scaling free tier without support overload
- Foundation for Bank AA integration (which will be strict about data)

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### Database Changes

```sql
-- New table: user_subscriptions
CREATE TABLE user_subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  plan VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'free' CHECK (plan IN ('free', 'pro', 'enterprise')),
  status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active' CHECK (status IN ('active', 'cancelled', 'expired')),
  razorpay_subscription_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  stripe_subscription_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  current_period_start TIMESTAMP,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP,
  amount_usd DECIMAL(10,2),
  currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'USD',
  payment_method VARCHAR(20), -- 'razorpay' or 'stripe'
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Extend users table
ALTER TABLE auth.users ADD COLUMN subscription_plan VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'free';
ALTER TABLE auth.users ADD COLUMN max_uploads_month INT DEFAULT 10; -- Free = 10, Pro = unlimited

-- New table: payment_events (idempotency + audit)
CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,

  external_event_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, -- Razorpay event_id
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),

);
```
